query: (cat:cs.RO OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.CV OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.CL OR cat:cs.MA OR cat:cs.HC OR cat:stat.ML OR cat:eess.SY OR cat:eess.IV) AND submittedDate:[202605140000 TO 202605142359]

papers.title: CoCo-InEKF: State Estimation with Learned Contact Covariances in Dynamic, Contact-Rich Scenarios
papers.summary: Robust state estimation for highly dynamic motion of legged robots remains challenging, especially in dynamic, contact-rich scenarios. Traditional approaches often rely on binary contact states that fail to capture the nuances of partial contact or directional slippage. This paper presents CoCo-InEKF, a differentiable invariant extended Kalman filter that utilizes continuous contact velocity covariances instead of binary contact states. These learned covariances allow the method to dynamically modulate contact confidence, accounting for more nuanced conditions ranging from firm contact to directional slippage or no contact. To predict these covariances for a set of predefined contact candidate points, we employ a lightweight neural network trained end-to-end using a state-error loss. This approach eliminates the need for heuristic ground-truth contact labels. In addition, we propose an automated contact candidate selection procedure and demonstrate that our method is insensitive to their exact placement. Experiments on a bipedal robot demonstrate a superior accuracy-efficiency tradeoff for linear velocity estimation, as well as improved filter consistency compared to baseline methods. This enables the robust execution of challenging motions, including dancing and complex ground interactions -- both in simulation and in the real world.
papers.title_zh: CoCo-InEKF：在动态、接触丰富的场景中使用学习的接触协方差进行状态估计
papers.summary_zh: 腿式机器人高动态运动的鲁棒状态估计仍然具有挑战性，特别是在动态、接触丰富的场景中。传统方法通常依赖于二元接触状态，无法捕捉部分接触或定向滑动的细微差别。本文提出了 CoCo-InEKF，一种可微不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器，它利用连续接触速度协方差而不是二元接触状态。这些习得的协方差允许该方法动态调节接触置信度，考虑到从牢固接触到定向滑动或无接触等更细微的条件。为了预测一组预定义接触候选点的协方差，我们采用了使用状态误差损失进行端到端训练的轻量级神经网络。这种方法消除了对启发式真实接触标签的需要。此外，我们提出了一种自动联系人候选人选择程序，并证明我们的方法对他们的确切位置不敏感。双足机器人上的实验表明，与基线方法相比，线速度估计具有卓越的精度-效率权衡，以及改进的滤波器一致性。这使得能够在模拟和现实世界中稳健地执行具有挑战性的动作，包括舞蹈和复杂的地面交互。

papers.title: A Prototyping Framework for Distributed Control of Multi-Robot Systems
papers.summary: This paper presents a prototyping framework for distributed control of multi-robot systems, aimed at bridging theory and practical testing of distributed optimization algorithms. Using the Single Program, Multiple Data (SPMD) paradigm, the framework emulates distributed control on a single computer, with each core running the same algorithm using local states and neighbour-to-neighbour communication. We demonstrate the framework on a four-quadrotor position-swapping task using a non-cooperative game-theoretic distributed algorithm. Computational time and trajectory data are compared across the supported dynamics levels: a point-mass model, a high-fidelity quadrotor model, and an experimental hardware testbed using Crazyflie quadcopters. The results show that the framework provides a low-cost and accessible approach for validating distributed algorithms.
papers.title_zh: 多机器人系统分布式控制的原型框架
papers.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种多机器人系统分布式控制的原型框架，旨在桥接分布式优化算法的理论和实际测试。该框架使用单程序、多数据 (SPMD) 范例，在单台计算机上模拟分布式控制，每个核心使用本地状态和邻居间通信运行相同的算法。我们使用非合作博弈论分布式算法演示了四旋翼位置交换任务的框架。在支持的动力学级别上比较计算时间和轨迹数据：点质量模型、高保真四旋翼模型和使用 Crazyflie 四轴飞行器的实验硬件测试台。结果表明，该框架为验证分布式算法提供了一种低成本且易于访问的方法。

papers.title: Radioactive Source Seeking using Bayesian Optimisation with Movement Penalty
papers.summary: The use of mobile robotics in radioactive source seeking has become an important part of modern radiation-safety practices, supporting timely mitigation of contamination risks and helping protect public health. However, measuring radiation is often time-consuming, rendering traditional gradient-based source-seeking methods less effective due to lower sample efficiency. This paper proposes a sample-efficient Bayesian-Optimisation source-seeking strategy that utilises a heteroscedastic Gaussian process surrogate to balance exploration and exploitation. Excessive inter-sample travel is discouraged through a movement switching cost. The strategy is shown to generate sublinear regret in the source-seeking task, while simulations demonstrate its effectiveness in localising radioactive sources.
papers.title_zh: 使用具有运动惩罚的贝叶斯优化来寻找放射源
papers.summary_zh: 在放射源寻找中使用移动机器人已成为现代辐射安全实践的重要组成部分，支持及时减轻污染风险并帮助保护公众健康。然而，测量辐射通常非常耗时，导致传统的基于梯度的寻源方法由于采样效率较低而效率较低。本文提出了一种样本有效的贝叶斯优化寻源策略，该策略利用异方差高斯过程代理来平衡探索和利用。通过移动切换成本来阻止过多的样本间移动。该策略被证明可以在源寻找任务中产生亚线性后悔，而模拟则证明了其在定位放射源方面的有效性。

papers.title: SeaVis: Modeling and Control of a Remotely Operated Towed Vehicle for Seabed Visualization and Mapping
papers.summary: High-resolution seafloor mapping necessitates stable and precise positioning for underwater robots. This paper introduces a novel mathematical model for SeaVis remotely operated towed vehicles (ROTVs) and develops a gain-scheduled linear-quadratic regulator (LQR) for robust depth and attitude control. We validate the approach in a high-fidelity simulation, benchmarking the LQR against a conventional PID controller over a challenging seabed profile. The presented results demonstrate the LQR's superior performance, with significantly enhanced robustness to disturbances, greater control efficiency, and substantially reduced flap actuation. The gain scheduling also confirms the controller's effectiveness across the full operational velocity range. The complete simulation environment and controller are open-sourced.
papers.title_zh: SeaVis：用于海底可视化和测绘的远程操作拖曳车的建模和控制
papers.summary_zh: 高分辨率海底测绘需要水下机器人稳定且精确的定位。本文介绍了 SeaVis 远程操作拖曳车 (ROTV) 的新颖数学模型，并开发了一种用于稳健深度和姿态控制的增益调度线性二次调节器 (LQR)。我们在高保真模拟中验证了该方法，在具有挑战性的海底剖面上将 LQR 与传统 PID 控制器进行基准测试。所提出的结果证明了 LQR 的卓越性能，显着增强了对干扰的鲁棒性，提高了控制效率，并大大减少了襟翼驱动。增益调度还确认了控制器在整个操作速度范围内的有效性。完整的仿真环境和控制器是开源的。
